title: adina orientalis
intro: Adina orientalis, also known as the Burmese ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Adina orientalis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Adina orientalis is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
